subcodes.first_line: In this transient world, verily the end of all riches is poverty, and the ultimate outcome of every gathering is dispersion and distraction, and the final result of every state of health [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در اين جهان فانی عاقبت هر غنائی فقر است و نهايت هر جمعی تفرقه و پريشانی و غايت هر صحّت
subcodes.subjects: @existence; immortality of the human soul, @soul; spirit after death, @thankfulness; gratitude, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity of thought and belief
